recommendations.title: Je te veux moi non plus
recommendations.overview: Nina and Dylan, best friends since childhood, have no secrets from each other. Nina now lives in Paris, while Dylan lives in Biarritz. Dylan always thought they'd end up together, but has never seriously taken a chance on Nina, since she laughs at hi

recommendations.title: Paper Planes
recommendations.overview: Dylan discovers he has a talent for making paper planes. He has a chance to compete in a world championship, but he'll have to face bullies and self-doubt to do so.

recommendations.title: Dylan Dog: Dead of Night
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Fantasy, Horror, Mystery, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: Supernatural private eye, Dylan Dog, seeks out the monsters of the Louisiana bayou in his signature red shirt, black jacket and blue jeans.

recommendations.title: The Edge of Love
recommendations.overview: When the Welsh poet Dylan Thomas and his flirtatious wife Caitlin sweep into war-torn London, the last thing they expect is to bump into Dylan's childhood sweetheart Vera. Despite her joy at seeing Dylan after so many years, Vera is swept off her fee

recommendations.title: Geek Charming
recommendations.overview: Film geek Josh is looking for the subject of his new documentary when a chance meeting puts the perfect star in his sights—Dylan, his school's most popular junior. But Dylan's hopes of using the film to become Blossom Queen don't quite match with Jos

recommendations.title: I'm Not There
recommendations.overview: Six actors portray six personas of music legend Bob Dylan in scenes depicting various stages of his life, chronicling his rise from unknown folksinger to international icon and revealing how Dylan constantly reinvented himself.

recommendations.title: Deep
recommendations.overview: Four insomniac med school students are lured into a neuroscience experiment that spirals out of control and must find a way out before it’s too late.
recommendations.director: Thanabodee Uawithya, Jetarin Ratanaserikiat, Apirak Samudkitpaisan, Sita Likitvanichkul, Adirek Watleela

recommendations.title: Blind Horizon
recommendations.overview: Left for dead in the remote Southwest, Frank is found clinging to life and in a state of amnesia. As he recovers, ominous memories begin to flash back...

recommendations.title: Drishyam 2
recommendations.overview: 7 years after the case related to Vijay Salgaonkar and his family was closed, a series of unexpected events bring truth to light that threatens to change everything for the Salgaonkars. Can Vijay save his family this time?

recommendations.title: Spontaneous
recommendations.overview: When students in their high school begin inexplicably exploding (literally), seniors Mara and Dylan struggle to survive in a world where each moment may be their last.
